name: qa-reporter
description: Portable QA reporting plugin with a qa-reporter skill for producing report_state JSON, test reports, issue packages, SIT/UAT documents, coverage-risk summaries, and sign-off recommendations.

interface.shortDescription: Build QA reports and sign-off packages.
interface.longDescription: QA Reporter provides a portable skill for converting planner, executor, manual execution, or exploratory issue input into governed report_state JSON, review-ready reports, issue submission packages, SIT/UAT documents, coverage-risk summaries, and Go/Conditional Go/No-Go/Not Assessed recommendations.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use qa-reporter to generate a QA report package from execution results or issue findings.
